description:
Generate QR codes on share intent A lightweight app to share links, contacts, and text through QR codes. Under 1Mb Download!
  • Share a link, contact, or text. Then select QRshare to generate a QR code.
  • Modify shared text by editing in the text box. Tap the picture to update the QR code.
  • Tap and hold on the picture to copy the QR code to clipboard, edit the text, or share the QR code.
